text:
GitHub is blocking the push because a previous commit in the history contains a secret (a GitHub token stored in the `.vie` session files). You'll need to allow the push via this URL:

**https://github.com/GandhiOnchain/gtool/security/secret-scanning/unblock-secret/3Af2LKo0rpgYs1EsVhd9zA1jMl8**

Go to that link, click "Allow secret", then I can retry the push. Alternatively, you can go to your repo's **Settings → Code security → Secret scanning → Push protection** and bypass it there.

Once you've unblocked it, let me know and I'll push again.
